query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `autoApprovalRules` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `ruleName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `ruleType` enum('confidence_threshold','source_type','keyword_count','skill_category','combined') NOT NULL,
  `conditions` text NOT NULL,
  `action` enum('auto_approve','auto_reject','flag_priority','notify_admin') NOT NULL,
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `timesTriggered` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `lastTriggeredAt` timestamp,
  `createdBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
